name: mac
description: MAC (Mastra Agentic Coding) — reusable Mastra building blocks + a deployable reference app. GitHub repo-maintenance agent.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,studio -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -C apps/server dev" "pnpm -C apps/server studio"
scripts.dev:tunnel: concurrently -k -n server,studio,tunnel -c cyan,magenta,yellow "pnpm -C apps/server dev" "pnpm -C apps/server studio" "pnpm tunnel"
